articles.author: Kiona N. Smith
articles.title: Neanderthal brains measure up to ours—literally - Ars Technica
articles.description: The differences between our brains and Neanderthals' were likely cosmetic.

articles.title: Chinese Billionaire Overhauls AI Startup After Warning on Manus - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: The fallout from Meta Platforms Inc.’s controversial acquisition of Manus is prompting one tech founder to erect strict walls between his Chinese and US businesses, calling it a regrettable but necessary template for navigating geopolitical tensions.

articles.author: Jennifer Ouellette
articles.title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings - Ars Technica
articles.description: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.
